TextENGNew: The cries of cicadas cascaded down like rain, resounding across the entire garden.
changeReason: New translation adds 'cascaded down like rain' and 'entire garden' (JPN: 降り注ぐように/庭一面), making the imagery more vivid and complete than the simpler original.

TextENGNew: The sun blazed brilliantly overhead -- a perfect day for hanging laundry.
changeReason: New translation uses 'blazed' and changes sentence structure with an em dash; shifts from 'making it the perfect day' to a more literary 'a perfect day for.'

TextENGNew: Though in the distance beyond the mountains, towering cumulonimbus clouds loomed.
changeReason: Rephrased from 'off in the mountains' to 'beyond the mountains' with 'loomed,' changing the spatial relationship and adding ominous connotation.

TextENGNew: The temperature was a touch high as well, so evening showers might well be on their way... I would need to keep an eye out.
changeReason: Shifts from present tense first-person ('It's a little warm') to past tense third-person narration ('The temperature was'), changing narrative perspective.

TextENGNew: ``Phew... there we go.``
changeReason: Changes 'all done' to 'there we go' (JPN: よいしょ); new translation better captures the Japanese interjection used when exerting effort.

TextENGNew: I finished hanging two people's worth of laundry on the drying pole and wiped the sweat from my brow.
changeReason: Changes 'our clothes on the clothesline' to 'two people's worth of laundry on the drying pole' (JPN: 二人分の洗濯物を物干し竿), adding specificity about quantity and object.

TextENGNew: And then, just as I was about to get a broom to sweep the shrine grounds, I spotted a familiar face coming through the shrine gate's stone stairway.
``You've gotten quite good at housework, Hanyuu.@k@vS16/00/DS43030020. Good job.``
``...Ah, Shino.``
I smiled back at the woman, who waved while walking toward me.
She was Shino Kimiyoshi.
Shino was the only daughter of the Kimiyoshi family, the bloodline that served as the mayors of Onigafuchi Village, and was now a good friend of mine.
``...Mmm. The water from the shrine's well is as cool as ever.@k@vS16/00/DS43030022. I wonder how it stays cold as ice even in the middle of this summer heat?``
``Heehee... who knows?@k@vS16/45/DS43070960. More importantly, you'll hurt your head if you drink so fast.``
``It's all right, I'm not that wea...@k@vS16/00/DS43030024. ugh, agh, ow, owww...``
``See, what did I tell you?@k@vS16/45/DS43070962. Heehee...``
I couldn't help but chuckle at my friend's charming actions.
Shino appeared to be a graceful woman with no chinks in her armor, but seeing her holding her head while pounding on the living room floor was oddly amusing.
...It had been about three months since I'd gotten acquainted with Shino through Riku.

On that day, Riku and I were to pledge our lives to each other under the cherry blossom trees and were resolved to be married... However, at the same time, we realized there was a big problem that needed to be solved.
Right... I wasn't very good at doing the bare minimum of ``housework`` I'd be required to do as Riku's wife.
...No, I'll be honest.
To be blunt, I'd had almost no experience beyond helping out here and there, and was a complete amateur.
``Um... Riku?@k@vS16/45/DS43070964. How are my housework skills?``
``Umm... mmm, well...@k@vS16/46/DS43020567. To be honest, I can't say for sure that I can say that they are not good.``
``Which is it?!``

``Well, uh, you're decent when it comes to cleaning, but...@k@vS16/46/DS43020569. You ruin clothes when doing laundry, and watching you sew is so painful I can hardly bear to watch.@k@vS16/46/DS43020570. And your cooking is... uh...``
It's true that when we gave the leftovers I'd made to a passing stray dog... it passed out and foamed at the mouth.
Though I used the same ingredients as Riku, everything I cooked seemed to be deadly poisonous... Why?
``But in that case, how are you not affected by it?``
``Why, that's because I love you, of course.``
``...I'll admit I'm happy to hear that, but...@k@vS16/45/DS43070969. In other words, without love, it cannot be eaten...?``
...Riku's loss for words said it all, so I didn't pry any further.
(This'll require substantial effort, huh...?)
What I'd studied and honed up until now was my skills with a sword. I took pride in that, and believed it to be everything.
However... if I was to be Riku's wife, I needed the resolve to throw away who I'd been up until now and learn a completely different skillset.
And if possible, I didn't want to depend on his patronage as I had up until now.
I loved Riku, and I was truly happy right now.
So I wanted to make every effort possible to repay him for that joy he'd given me.
(Though that said, I can't rely on Ryuun-Ohc for this, given that she's been specialized for battle knowledge...)
In fact, I tried counting on her a few times, grasping at whatever straws I could, but... none of it was helpful.
And so, just as I was at a loss for who and where I could learn about doing chores from...
``It's a pleasure to meet you, I'm Shino Kimiyoshi.``
``Oh, umm... p-pleased to... meet you.``
One day... Shino came to me at Riku's prompting.
I'd seen her talking to Riku at the shrine grounds a number of times before, so I remembered her well.
However, I was a bit tense since it was my first time speaking to her face to face.
``Heehee... Oh Riku, where in the world did you find such a cute girl?@k@vS16/00/DS43030027. For someone who acts like he's not interested in women, you sure are cunning.``
``Oh man, ahahaha...``

``Everyone was worried about why you kept turning down marriage proposals at your age, you know?@k@vS16/00/DS43030029. If you already had your heart set on someone, you should have told us sooner... Geez.``
``I'm sorry.@k@vS16/46/DS43020575. With that said, I know this comes rather late, but allow me to introduce you.``

``Late indeed... heehee.@k@vS16/00/DS43030031. All right, I'll put in a good word with the village elders.@k@vS16/00/DS43030032. Incidentally, when is the wedding to be?@k@vS16/00/DS43030033. Also...``
``Um... so, what business do you have with me...?``
``Oh, my apologies.@k@vS16/00/DS43030035. Silly me, getting carried away like that.``
Shino then cleared her throat, stood up straight, and turned back to me.

``I've heard the details from Riku.@k@vS16/00/DS43030037. I know it must be difficult for a foreigner from overseas to live according to another culture, so I will be visiting to assist you on whatever I can do to help.``
``I hope we get along well, Hanyuu-san.``
``Y-yes...@k@vS16/45/DS43070975. I'd like that too... I mean, I very much hope the same.``
``Heehee... There's no need to be so formal.@k@vS16/00/DS43030040. As you can see, we appear to be around the same age... so treat me as you would a friend, all right?``
After I nodded awkwardly, Shino smiled widely to ease my tension, and took my hand.
...It was warm and soft.
From what I heard, Riku had asked her to come here to teach me about housework and the way things worked around here.
Naturally, there would have been problems if he'd told her I was a god or someone from another world, so it seemed he'd told her I was a foreigner.
Not that it was entirely inaccurate... but I felt a little guilty when it came to my age. After all, I was much older than Shino, to say the least of the village elders.
``Shino-san is a woman.@k@vS16/46/DS43020577. So I'm sure she will be able to notice things that I couldn't, and help you out.``

``Yes, he's right.@k@vS16/00/DS43030042. Riku isn't the most sensible of people... or maybe it would be better to say he gets too carried away with his assumptions?@k@vS16/00/DS43030043. Not only that, he never listens to others, either...``
``Ah... Yes, it's just as you say.``

``Ahahaha, I knew it!@k@vS16/00/DS43030045. In any case, since you're Riku's wife, you're like a little sister to me.@k@vS16/00/DS43030046. So please don't hesitate to ask me anything that comes to mind.``
Shino laughed with a cheerful expression... It would seem she was a rather broadminded person who was very open around strangers.
Apparently, she'd been Riku's friend since childhood and taken care of him like an older sister.
As such, she knew his personality well... I had to admit I felt a little jealous about that.
(Someone who knows sides of Riku I don't, huh...?)
Well, that said, she was already married and had two sons.
...And, although it was only a mite, I could feel Riku consciously building a wall against her for the whole conversation.
I understood that was out of consideration for me... and was a bit relieved.
``I look forward to receiving your help, Shino-san.``
``Yes, likewise.@k@vS16/00/DS43030048. By all means, please call me Shino.``
...And so, Shino started instructing me.
At first it was all a disaster, with Shino getting exasperated with me time and time again, and occasionally receiving stern warnings from her.
Despite that, thanks to her boundless benevolence and willingess to teach me, even I slowly but surely managed to get good enough that I could somehow take care of housework.
``You're finally getting the laundry right too.@k@vS16/00/DS43030050. I was worried at first, but you're already a splendid wife by now.``
``It's all thanks to your guidance, Shino.@k@vS16/45/DS43070982. I don't think I could have done anything resembling housework without you.``

``Ahaha, I was surprised at first.@k@vS16/00/DS43030052. When Riku asked me to teach his wife how to do housework, my first thought was that you must have been quite the slouch.@k@vS16/00/DS43030053. I never would have expected you to be a foreigner.``
``Ah... I'm sorry.@k@vS16/45/DS43070984. I am still not familiar with this country's culture, and...``

``Heehee... Please, don't apologize.@k@vS16/00/DS43030055. It's only natural you don't know, and I'd like to think I understand how it feels to marry in an unfamiliar place.@k@vS16/00/DS43030056. So ask me anything you'd like until you've got it all down, okay?``
``But it feels like I'm imposing on you...``
``It's all right.@k@vS16/00/DS43030058. After all, we're friends, right?``
``...Yes.@k@vS16/45/DS43070987. You are my dear... friend.``
I answered from the bottom of my heart.
...I can't begin to process just how much of a godsend Shino has been for me.
Truth be told, there's a reason why we became fast friends in such a short time... A little while ago, Shino accidentally discovered my horns.
It happened about a month after she started instructing me in the ways of housework.
Shino happened to trip on a bump in the ground, and I saved her from falling.
At that moment... she accidentally touched my head, knocking the hood covering my horns off.
I turned my head away from Shino's wide eyes.
...I thought it was all over.
That even though I'd finally gotten along with someone other than Riku, my carelessness had destroyed it all...
That dejection and despair welled up inside me, leading me to hang my head.
...However, Shino reached out for my horns without any sort of discomfort... and spoke with a smile.
``These sure are cute.``
``Thank you, Hanyuu.@k@vS16/00/DS43030062. I should have watched my step... Here you go.``
Shino said that, picked my hood off the ground as if it were completely natural, and put it on my head.
She never brought up my horns after that.
And her attitude... didn't change a single bit.
``Not at all. She is a foreigner, after all.@k@vS16/00/DS43030064. For example... it's just like having different colored eyes. So even if she looks different, it's not strange, right?``
...The next day, when Riku secretly questioned Shino after I told him what happened, she just said that and smiled, not bothered by it in the least.
That's probably how she decided to take it.
And, perhaps out of consideration for me, she didn't tell any of the other villagers and kept coming over as if nothing had happened.
...I was happy.
From that point on, I treasured Shino as a friend, and trusted her from the bottom of my heart...
``...Thank you, Shino.``
``? Where's this coming from?@k@vS16/00/DS43030066. Silly Hanyuu... heehee.``
``You're right.@k@vS16/45/DS43070992. Perhaps I am a little silly.``
Perhaps putting that into words only made me sound distant instead... Even so, I wanted to let her know I was grateful.
For accepting a freak like me as just another woman, and being so kind to me...
``...Oh, that's right.@k@vS16/00/DS43030068. I forgot to give you something important.``
Shino said that, then put some stacked boxes behind her on the tea table.
The stack consisted of three solid boxes. They were so big that even I could tell from the outside that there must have been a lot of food in them.
``Here you go.@k@vS16/00/DS43030070. Extra ones just for you.``
``Yes. I made a little too much for today's memorial service.@k@vS16/00/DS43030072. You like these... right?``
Shino took the lid off the boxes and showed me what was inside.
The box was packed to the brim with rows of sweet mochi.
``Uwaaaah...!``
There were 9 per box layer, making for a total of 27.
This was quite a lot for what she claimed to be extra... Shino must have been planning to bring them to me from the start?
It was like a treasure box, what with its sweet smell and the gleam of azuki beans enveloping it...
``Since I was coming over, I figured we could eat them together.@k@vS16/00/DS43030074. I thought it could be a light snack until dinner if Riku were here, but...@k@vS16/00/DS43030075. Hanyuu?``
Shino's voice brought me back to my senses.
...Whoops, that was a close one. I was so taken by the sweetened mochi that I blacked out there.
``I-is something the matter, Shino?``
``No, you were just spacing out, that's all...``

``N-no, I was, uh...!@k@vS16/45/DS43070998. ...Right, we were talking about Riku, weren't we?!@k@vS16/45/DS43070999. He went to town on a personal errand today, you see...@k@vS16/45/DS43071000. So since he's not here, why don't we just eat without him?!``
``...How about you wipe that drool from your mouth first?``
``Auuuuuu?!``
I panicked and roughly wiped my mouth with my sleeves.
...Perhaps it's some sort of recoil from getting used to Riku's cooking, but lately I've found mouth-watering food particularly irresistible.
...Especially sweets and pastries. I'm completely at their mercy by now.
Ah... now that I think about it, those baked sweets I had on the mainland a really long time ago were quite good.
That rich sweetness and fluffy texture... Back then, I was only mildly curious, but if it were to be put in front of me right now, I highly doubt I'd stay sane for long.
By no means did I hate sweetened mochi, but I never imagined a day would come where I could eat sweets like that even in this country...
Oh no no no... It seemed my weakness was polluting my brain.
``Incidentally, what's Riku doing in town?``
``I don't know, he didn't give me the details.@k@vS16/45/DS43071003. All I know is he was stopping by the tailor shop...@k@|@y@vS16/45/DS43071004. ah.``
Just then... I sensed someone running up the shrine staircase.
...I don't even need to check to know that it's my beloved.
The owner of those footsteps avoided the shrines, loudly threw open the door to the Furude estate, and dashed into the living room.
``...Speak of the devil, huh?``
``Indeed.@k@vS16/45/DS43071006. Though I don't think there was any need for him to come running home.``
``Perhaps he wants to show you something?@k@vS16/00/DS43030081. Like, maybe he got a gift for you and wants to see how you'll react, or something...``
A gift? For me? From Riku?
...No, I can't think of any sort of reason he'd give me a gift.
If I had to say something, it's been exactly two years and...
Perhaps he bought me something to commemorate that?
A present from Riku... to mark the third anniversary of our meeting.
When I unconsciously imagined that, my heart thumped.
Did Riku... buy something for me?
``Oh my... Hanyuu?@k@vS16/00/DS43030083. You're blushing.``
``Wha... n-no... I'm not!``
``Heehee... how precious, you're embarrassed～♪``
I could do nothing but keep quiet at Shino's amused teasing.
...For now, I'll relish Shino's sweetened mochi after I see the gift.
I get the feeling it'll taste much better if I wait on that...
``Oh, that's right.@k@vS16/45/DS43071012. I'll need to get one more teacu...``
I tried to stand up, but the paper door slammed open with a loud thud.
I turned around to find Riku on the other side of the doorway with a triumphant look on his face.
And that moment... a chill ran down my spine.
I had a very bad feeling. The expectation I'd just been feeling immediately turned into anxiety.
...No good was ever waiting in the wings when Riku looked that happy.
Riku's eyes sparkled before he even caught his breath.
``Please look at this, Hanyuu!@k@vS16/46/DS43020579. The new miko outfit is done! Truly a work after my own heart!!``
I knew it. My faint hopes had been completely crushed...
``...I'm sorry, what?``
``Like I said, it's a miko outfit!@k@vS16/46/DS43020581. It would be no exaggeration to call it the greatest of its kind!@k@vS16/46/DS43020582. Now go ahead, please wear it!``
Time came to a halt.
I was frozen in place with my body only half risen to my feet, with Shino equally immobile.
Only Riku and his rapid panting were carving time into this still world.
``R-Riku...?@k@vS16/45/DS43071017. Could you say that again?@k@vS16/45/DS43071018. What... exactly... is done?``

``Of course, I'd be glad to oblige.@k@vS16/46/DS43020584. This magnificently crafted miko outfit is done!@k@vS16/46/DS43020585. I had the best one in the world made! I just know you'll love this one!``
Riku then took a kimono out from the wrapping cloth he'd carefully tucked under his arm, and showed it to me.
...It was a work of the devil. Literally. No exaggeration.
...I'd already given up when it came to the split sleeves that showed off the upper arms.
But beyond that, there was a big hole to expose most of the back.
What's more, he'd added something absolutely outlandish this time...!

``I believe this is the best miko outfit I could have ever conceived as I stand now.@k@vS16/46/DS43020587. I based it on the outfit you're currently wearing, while building off the split sleeves by giving you a wide-open back this time, too!``
``W-whaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaat?!``
Riku said that, and thrust the miko outfit he was holding out to me.
The red hakama was a little shorter than normal... and no matter how you looked at it or thought about it, the sleeves only went up to the chest.
It had been warped beyond recognition from its original form... This was clearly something else altogether, wasn't it, you bastard?!!

``I can't believe how naive I've been until now.@k@vS16/46/DS43020589. I talked about pursuing the beauty of women to express the wonder of mikos, yet I still felt there was some line that must not be crossed with miko outfits.``
``But that was a vice which impeded the evolution of miko outfits.@k@vS16/46/DS43020591. New worlds are paved with revolution, and miko outfits are no different.``
``So the greatest miko outfit I could create as I was...@k@vS16/46/DS43020593. needed a novel and refined idea!``
(Th-this son of a...!!)
My head hurt.
Incidentally, Riku only went to town a handful of times a year.
That was because as Onigafuchi Village's reincarnation of Oyashiro-sama, he received all his daily necessities from the village's donations.
So he only ever went all the way to town if he was after something he normally couldn't get otherwise.
However...
Even so...
He made this rare shopping trip... to get that of all thiiiings?!
``Actually, this miko outfit has something never attempted by women's clothing up until now.``
``And that is the stomach!``

``The white robe goes down to the chest, while the red hakama has been made not to tie at the chest, but at the waist just like men!@k@vS16/46/DS43020597. By doing so, the stomach, never seen in day-to-day life, can be bared for the world to see!``

``Furthermore, since the lower half of the white robe is gone, there is nothing on the inner side of the red hakama, so the slits open on both sides are...@k@vS16/46/DS43020599. Aaah, aaaah, is that Shangri-La I see there...?!``
``...Hold it right there, you bastard.``
...Come to think of it, I remember what Riku told me when I asked him where he was going in town.
The tailor shop.
Aah... I'm such an idiot for expecting anything from that stupid jackass.
The chills I'd just been feeling vanished, replaced with some sort of boiling heat that flowed through my body and passed into my fists.
...In other words...
The gift was never what I had expected...
But was just another goddamn miko outfit from the very staaaart?!

``I couldn't make this one on my own, but some likeminded comrades of mine put all their effort into making it!@k@vS16/46/DS43020601. We only became acquainted recently, but they are very talented tailors.``
``Now go on, Hanyuu, even you should have no problem with thi...``
``Of course I have a probleeeeeeeeeeem!!``
``Hngarabhaaaaaaaah?!``
I closed the distance between Riku and me in one go, and punched him hard.
Though I didn't put my full strength into it, I didn't exactly show him mercy either.
After two seconds, Riku flew from the veranda and vanished into a grove of trees.
``...I swear!@k@vS16/45/DS43071024. What in the world is Riku thinking?!``
``A-ahaha...@k@vS16/00/DS43030087. I'm afraid I'm just as clueless as you on that.``
A few minutes had passed since then.
After blowing Riku away, Shino and I headed over to the veranda to eat her sweetened mochi.
Incidentally, Riku was lying at my feet, still unconscious.
``But what kind of wife are you to not bring him home?``
``Are you even listening to yourself?!@k@vS16/45/DS43071026. He should be grateful I even bothered to drag him back this far!``
``Someone's in a bad mood...``
I snorted in response... Maybe it didn't look like, but this was a fairly large compromise on my part.
Truth been told, I'd been planning to just leave him like always... but when Shino asked if I was going to help him, I reluctantly dragged Riku out of the grove and brought him here.
``Honestly, that Riku!@k@vS16/45/DS43071028. What will it take for him to finally get over his miko outfit obsession?!``
``It's true that his love of miko outfits isn't normal.@k@vS16/00/DS43030091. ...But I wonder why it was that he never asked me to wear any of them?``

``Ah... now that I think about it, he said that if you ever wore one, you'd destroy the whole illusion of miko outfits.@k@vS16/45/DS43071030. Something about how you weren't innocent enough, or that your face looked more manly than modest.``
``...I take everything back. Why don't we throw him in the river?``
Shino smiled... as a vein nearly burst from her temple.
It seemed Riku didn't dare defy her at all because she'd been taking care of him like an older sister since he was a child.
So if my scolding didn't do the trick with him, then maybe a whack from Shino would? ...Though I wouldn't exactly be all for that.
``Anyway, Riku is too abnormal!@k@vS16/45/DS43071032. He just refuses to listen, no matter how many times I say no!``
``Or what, did he touch a cursed miko outfit in a treasure house, and got possessed by the ghost of a woman who was doomed to never wear it?!``
``If he were cursed, then maybe we could at least exorcise or purify him...``

``You can say that again!@k@vS16/45/DS43071035. If it were a ghost or an apparition, then its structure should be nearly identical to an astral body!@k@vS16/45/DS43071036. Then all I would have to do is break it down molecularly with Ryuun technology, or make it assimilate with something, then cut it down! It's not fair!``
I raised my voice in unquellable anger, and complained to no one in particular.
The one I should've directed it at was lying at my feet, but he was unconscious, so there was nothing I could do.
I continued venting like that for a while until Shiho, who'd been halfheartedly playing along with me, suddenly chuckled.
``...What is it, Shino?``
``Say, Hanyuu?@k@vS16/00/DS43030097. Did you want a present that badly?``
``...N-not really...``
I tried denying it, but it seemed the truth was written all over my face. As soon as she saw that, Shino patted my head with a smirk.

``Despite everything you say, you sure do love Riku, don't you?@k@vS16/00/DS43030099. That's why you're mad he didn't buy you what you were hoping for, right?@k@vS16/00/DS43030100. I know how that feels.``
``Wh-where in the world is this coming from?!@k@vS16/45/DS43071040. How does it seem that way to you at all?!``
``Heehee. Oh Hanyuu, you're so kyute~.@k@vS16/00/DS43030102. I just want to take you home.``
...I really was no match for Shino. She always hit the nail right on the head when it came to seeing through me.
Figuring any further retorts would be pointless, I reached for a sweetened mochi.
(...Sheesh.)
I let out a small sigh and took a bite out of one.
Huh? Something was different from usual.
Normally, eating sweets made me happy the moment I tasted them, but this time...
``Urgh, ulp...!``
``H-Hanyuu?! What's wrong?!``
I covered my mouth as I headed into the garden and crouched behind a bush.
A sudden rush of nausea overwhelmed me.
Unable to fight it back, I threw up the contents of my stomach before I even knew what was happening.
``Urgh... aah, ulgh... bleghhhhh...!``
``Hanyuu?@k@vS16/00/DS43030105. Are you all right?!``
Shino rubbed my back.
But the nausea refused to leave me, and I couldn't stop groaning.
``Haah, haah, haah...!!``
Then, finally...
I stopped throwing up. But the sickening sensation in my stomach stayed, and by the time that sharp, acidic taste filled my mouth... I finally regained enough strength to sit down.
``...Cough, cough... urgh...@k@vS16/45/DS43071048. Wh-what in the world was that...?``
I couldn't help but be baffled by my sudden episode.
I didn't understand how it'd happened... Maybe I was sick?
But as a Ryuun Putus, my immunity was far greater than a human's, so it didn't seem like I could get infected by this world's viruses.
Then was it some sort of new illness that surpassed a Ryuun's immunity?
...Impossible. If something like that was spreading, the villagers would have been wiped out.
Then what could it be...?
``...Hey, Hanyuu.``
Just then, Shino spoke in a serious voice.
A moment later, she gave a kind smile that seemed to be bursting with joy, and she continued.
``You're...@k@vS16/00/DS43030108. having a baby, aren't you?``

``I mean a baby, a baby!@k@vS16/00/DS43030110. That nausea must have been morning sickness.@k@vS16/00/DS43030111. I can't think of any other reason why you'd throw up one of those sweetened mochi you love so much!``
``That's right! Riku's baby!``
Shino took my hands and enthusiastically swung them up and down.
...No way.
I was... pregnant?!
Putus' had an extremely low birthrate.
Moreover, Riku was a human, so even if it were genetically possible, the odds of conceiving a child in a mixed species relationship were astronomically low.
...At least, that's what I'd believed.
And yet...
Me and Riku's child was growing within me...?!
``R-rea... lly?``
``Really, really!@k@vS16/00/DS43030114. Ahaha, this is wonderful!@k@vS16/00/DS43030115. Now you're going to be a mother, too!``
``I'm going to be... a mother...?``
My mind went blank... from this utterly unexpected turn of events.
...In all honesty, I'd thought I didn't need children.
That's not to say I didn't want any, though. I was just as much a woman as any other, and had dreamed of having a child with the man I loved.
But... I'd already given up from the start. Since Riku and I were different species, that wish was nigh-impossible.
...In fact, Ryuun-Ohc had also said as much. It was only natural, so I wasn't sad about it or anything.
(That's right... just having Riku's enough for me.@k@vS16/45/DS43071055. I shouldn't wish for any further bliss...)
...And yet...
I touched my stomach. No change had appeared yet, but our child was there.
I was supposed to have given up on it.
And yet...
``...Hanyuu.``
``Uuu, aah... ghh, hic...!``
I couldn't stop... crying for joy.
Large teardrops cascaded and fell from the corners of my eyes...
``How wonderful.@k@vS16/00/DS43030118. Isn't this wonderful, Hanyuu?!``
I nodded.
My body was naturally trembling. I was so happy I felt like I was soaring above the clouds.
``Ahaha, I see... so you're finally going to be a mother too.@k@vS16/00/DS43030120. I'm looking forward to seeing what kind of child you'll have.``
``Yes, me too...@k@vS16/45/DS43071059. I wonder if they'll end up looking like me or Riku...@k@vS16/45/DS43071060. ?!``
Just then...
My tears stopped at my own words.
...Look like us?
Hold on, what did I just say?
Me and Riku's child.
A child... with both human and Ryuun blood.
In other words... with horns, just like me.
...A ``demon's`` child...?!
These horns... have brought me pain more times than I can even begin to count.
When I thought that... my joy completely shattered to pieces, and vanished.
The delight that had filled my heart... was gone without a single trace.
``...Hanyuu?@k@vS16/00/DS43030122. What's wrong?``
Shino gave me a flabbergasted look when I suddenly stood up.
But I was in no state of mind to answer her... I just looked at Riku in terror.
...I couldn't.
I couldn't tell Riku about this.
Because if I did, he would surely want the child just as I had in my dreams.
But if I had the baby... someone would suffer.
All because of their appearance.
All because they were born with something the humans of this world don't possess.
Would it be me? Riku? Or... the child themself...
``Aah... aaaah...!``
The more I thought about it... the dizzier I got from the weight and bitterness of those implications.
What should I do...?
What in the world do I do...?!
...There was a fierce thunderstorm in the evening, just as I'd predicted.
Rain endlessly echoed from the attic like a constant roar.

After what happened, I sent Shino home, doing everything in my power to keep calm. I brought the unconscious Riku into the house... and holed myself up in the ritual storehouse before I even knew what I was doing.
If I stayed in the house, I would've had to face Riku once he eventually woke up.
That would be painful right now... so I came here to essentially hide until I could at least get my thoughts and feelings sorted out.
I huddled up in a corner of the dark room... as Shino's words kept replaying in my mind.
...You're pregnant.
You're going to have a baby, Hanyuu.
A baby.
Riku's baby... and the baby of me, a horned Ryuun.
So... if the baby happened to have horns just like me...
I unconsciously looked up and noticed the statue of ``Oyashiro-sama`` ahead of me, blanketed in darkness.
Riku's father had had it made by the feudal lord's personal religious image maker back in the castle town.
After the tragedy, he'd modeled it off of me and turned it into a symbol of worship for the villagers... but it had no horns.
Instead, it bore an expression of serene, maternal affection...
changeReason: Restructures from 'a peaceful face brimming with affection, like a mother' to 'an expression of serene, maternal affection,' condensing the simile into an adjective.

TextENGNew: Conversely, one glance at the statue told me everything about how deeply the people of this land feared and reviled those with horns -- the 'demons.'
changeReason: Changes 'taboo' to 'feared and reviled,' 'horned demons' framing shifts with added em dash and single quotes instead of double; new translation conveys stronger emotional revulsion.

TextENGNew: ``What... what should I do...?!``
changeReason: Changes 'What do I do' to 'What should I do' (JPN: どうすれば), adding a sense of moral deliberation rather than simple confusion.

TextENGNew: A child would be born. How wonderful -- how joyful that should be.
changeReason: Original says 'How delightful it would be if I had the child'; new says 'A child would be born. How wonderful.' The original adds a conditional 'if' not in the Japanese (子供が産まれる is declarative).

TextENGNew: A single life, created between Riku and me, dwelt within my womb. Even now, that life was striving with all its might to live, growing steadily day by day.
changeReason: Changes 'right in my belly' to 'dwelt within my womb' and adds 'day by day' (JPN: すくすくと); new translation is more literary and adds temporal progression.

TextENGNew: --I wanted to give birth.
changeReason: Changes 'I wanted to have the baby' to 'I wanted to give birth' (JPN: 産みたい literally 'want to give birth'); new translation is more literal.

TextENGNew: But... I could not.
changeReason: Changes 'there was no way I could' to 'I could not' (JPN: 産むわけにはいかない); original implies impossibility, new implies prohibition/resolve.

TextENGNew: (What if... this child were born with horns, just like mine?)
changeReason: Changes 'has horns just like me' to 'were born with horns, just like mine' (JPN: 角が生えていたら); new adds 'born with' and shifts 'me' to 'mine' (possessive).

TextENGNew: The very thought was unbearable...!
changeReason: Changes 'That's not funny' to 'The very thought was unbearable' (JPN: 冗談じゃない); both are valid readings but convey very different emotional registers.

TextENGNew: My heart writhed in terror at the mere imagining of it, until I felt I might lose my mind.
changeReason: Restructures for more literary tone; 'at the mere imagining of it' vs 'just imagining it,' and 'might lose my mind' vs 'going to go crazy.'

TextENGNew: Could I raise them to hide their horns, just like me?
...No, out of the question.
It would be too pitiful for that child to be forced to live that way... when they'd done nothing wrong.
(Besides...)
I wasn't just worried about the villagers treating a child with horns coldly.
No, this was something far more threatening... and terrifying.
(The child of a pureblooded Putus and a human...@k@vS16/45/DS43071073. Wouldn't you call that a half-blooded Grifys?)
I didn't know. But it wasn't impossible.
One who assimilated with a Ryuun who'd imperfectly possessed them... was a Grifys.
Then if a child born with the blood of a Putus and human ever came to be... what would you call them?
Would they literally be a half-blooded Grifys?
Or would they be a subspecies, or something completely different altogether?
And if they had the potential to lose their sense of reason and become ``demonified`` just like a Grifys... what in the world would I do?
The duty of a Putus was to kill ``demonified`` Grifys... That was how I'd lived up until now.
I brought peace to the world by killing demons.
Then... was that my duty?
To... kill?
So if the child became ``demonified``... I would have to kill them?
Slay. Eliminate. Murder. Kill. KILL?
``With my own hands... I'd...!!``
I stared at my hands.
Fear unconsciously raced through me, as I could have sworn I saw those hands dyed red.
Plop...
A drop of water fell on my hand.
The rain grew even fiercer and the wind became a gale, striking the walls of the ritual storehouse over and over.
Occasionally, the dark room would be illuminated by a blinding flash of lightning, followed by the sky-splitting boom of thunder.
...I'm scared.
I'm scared, I'm scared, I'm scared, I'm scared, I'm scared... I'm scared.
Could I ever do something like that?
Did I really have to do it?
Just considering the possibility... made my body shiver all over, without an end in sight...!
Just then...
...What're you afraid of?
What're you so scared of?
You, a Jedha, terrified?
Why is it that you, said to be the strongest Ryuun, tremble in horror so?
It was an auditory hallucination.
And yet... it was a low... and detestable voice I'd heard somewhere before.
It simply cursed and resented me as it echoed in my head... sneering at all my fear and pain.
...Isn't that what you've always done thus far?
You've never questioned it once, right?
You believed it was absolute.
You believed it was your duty.
...So, why do you waver?
Why do you hesitate?
``...Silence.``
But even if I covered my ears...
Even if I covered my eyes...
And no matter how I tried to seal off my consciousness... the voice spoke directly to me.
Offering me the sweetest temptations...
Hatefully, mockingly...
...You've killed us, your brethren, up until now.
So many of us.
So many comrades.
Even though they were your comrades.
Even though they were your brethren.
You killed us.
You killed, killed, and kept killing with those hands.
...So just kill the baby with those hands.
KILL IT!@k KILL THE CHILD!!
``Shut up!!``
Shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up!
...How am I wrong?
What's the issue?
You've killed many of your brethren up until now.
One of them just happened to be your own child.
That's all.
...So kill it.
It's just a child.
You can just make another one...
``I said shut up!!!``
Kill the child!
Kill it.
Kill the damned creature!
Kill!
KILL!
``Uwaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!!``
I was assaulted with nausea that turned my stomach inside out the moment I screamed.
What... should I do?
Just what... am I supposed to do...?
I stood up crestfallen.
I dragged my feet over to the entrance, and opened the door.
I then left the ritual storehouse... going out into the rain.
...I lost track of how much time had passed after that.
I pushed my way through the trees and walked down the dark animal trails.
``Haah, haah, haah...!``
My mind was such a mess that the thought of shifting into my astral form didn't even occur to me, my gaze so narrow I could barely see anything around me.
My soaking body was all cut up, and my bare feet were smeared with blood.
...I'd stopped feeling pain a little while back.
I couldn't tell if the wet drops pouring down from my forehead were rain, sweat... or even blood.
Finally, I arrived at...
``...Can you hear me, Ryuun-Ohc?``
That's right... Onigafuchi Swamp.
I stood by the bank, drew my sword, and spoke to the charged crystal.
``Knowing you, you've already guessed why I'm here, right?``
``Hanyuu...``
``...Make preparations right away.@k@vS16/45/DS43071087. I'm about to begin synchronizing.``
``What's wrong?``
``...Are you really all right with that?``
Ryuun-Ohc sent her thoughts to me in a stiffer voice than normal. I immediately replied in the affirmative, then reached my hand out to the surface of the swamp as always.
That's right. I was going to make it... so this child never existed.
If I turned it into to something that never existed to begin with, then there'd be no need for anyone to feel pain, worry... or fear.
So...
I came here... resolved that this was the best and only choice.

``Hai-Ryuun Yeasomul Jedha.@k@vS16/45/DS43071090. Successor of the Jedha name, assigned by the Putus to investigate fellow brethren in this area.@k@vS16/45/DS43071091. I seek contact with ``Lynos`` Ryuun-Ohc.``
However...
Even though I performed the usual synchronization chant, I couldn't enter Ryuun-Ohc's inner workings in the swamp.
Confused, I went through the process over and over again... but nothing changed.
Realizing something was off, I called out to the charged crystal again.
``...What's wrong?@k@vS16/45/DS43071094. Hurry up and let me in already, Ryuun-Ohc.``
``...I cannot, Hanyuu.``
What did Ryuun-Ohc just say...?
Did she say... she couldn't?
But why?! She's always faithfully obeyed my orders... no, she shouldn't even possess the ability to defy me to begin with!
``Wh-What's the meaning of this...?@k@vS16/45/DS43071097. Is there some sort of problem, Ryuun-Ohc?``
``That is what I wish to ask you.@k@vS16/00/DS43050233. Hanyuu... I cannot approve of this decision in all good faith.``
``It seems you do not possess a firm understanding of what it means to abort a child.@k@vS16/00/DS43050235. Furthermore, what need even is there to do so?``
``Wha...? Are you listening to yourself?!@k@vS16/45/DS43071099. Shouldn't you be well aware of what tragedies the Grifys have caused in this world so far?!``
A being created from the imperfect fusion of a Ryuun and a human's soul... That was a Grifys.
They possessed a major risk of suddenly awakening to their instincts and becoming violent.
And if the cause of that was the abnormalities in their genes... then there was a great possibility that a child born of a human and Ryuun would have the same affliction...!

``A child born of myself and a human... could become a new threat to both human and Ryuun brethren alike, much like the Grifys.@k@vS16/45/DS43071101. ...Therefore, I will nip that disaster in the bud right here and now.@k@vS16/45/DS43071102. What's so strange about any of that?!``
``No, Hanyuu... you are lying.@k@vS16/00/DS43050237. And that is why... I reject that order.``
I gasped when I heard Ryuun-Ohc stubbornly deny me for the first time.
What's going on? At the very least, I didn't give her the function to decide if I was lying, nor to defy me, so why...?!
And... and what's more... at the very least, I had a hard time believing she would do something like guess my state of mind when we weren't even synchronized!
``Lying...? You say I'm lying?!@k@vS16/45/DS43071105. You're talking nonsense, Ryuun-Ohc!@k@vS16/45/DS43071106. Could an abnormality have developed in your thought circuits?!``
``I am perfectly normal.@k@vS16/00/DS43050239. If anything, I would have to say you are the one not in the right mind here.``
``...Hanyuu, you are trying to run away.@k@vS16/00/DS43050241. Not from being a mother...@k@vS16/00/DS43050242. but from taking responsibility for another's fate.``

``I find it hard to believe that you, who always faced powerful foes and accomplished difficult missions, would make this sort of decision.@k@vS16/00/DS43050244. Therefore, I came to the conclusion of denying your decision and rejecting it.``

``Wha... What the hell do you know, you damned imitation of life?!@k@vS16/45/DS43071109. Your duty is to obey me and assist me as necessary!@k@vS16/45/DS43071110. Yet you would have the gall to defy your creator?!!``
``...I was created with the objective of maintaining your wellbeing and preserving your happiness.``
``Therefore, by no means could I possibly approve a course of action that would bring you misery.@k@vS16/00/DS43050247. I wish to make the best decision for you.``
``Wh-why you...!``
Rage swelled within me, as I unconsciously narrowed my eyes and glared at the charged crystal.
...But I wasn't enraged because Ryuun-Ohc was wrong.
If anything, it was the other way around... it's because deep down, I only wished that were the case.

``Hanyuu, please compose yourself.@k@vS16/00/DS43050249. Will making yourself miserable really bring you peace?@k@vS16/00/DS43050250. Isn't living for yourself... and those dear to you... the best decision there is?``
``That's... That's...!!``
Those words...
Rattled me to the very core.
...I already knew.
Even I knew fully well.
Besides, who... who would ever wish to be unhappy?
I didn't need her to tell me what I considered to be true happiness...!
Even so...
Even so, I...!

``Then... then whose misery are you telling me to accept?@k@vS16/45/DS43071115. Are you saying I should throw away my pride as a Ryuun and stain my hands in the sin of allowing a catastrophe to spread?!@k@vS16/45/DS43071116. Screw that!@k@vS16/45/DS43071117. There's no way in hell I could do that!!``

``Why do you assume it will lead to misery?@k@vS16/00/DS43050252. What makes you so sure a catastrophe will spread?@k@vS16/00/DS43050253. You should have absolutely no way of knowing that result for certain at this point in time.``
``Your prediction is an illusion you came up with on your own. Merely one of many possible futures.``
``There is no proof it will come to pass.@k@vS16/00/DS43050256. There is no need whatsoever for you to be swayed by it.@k@vS16/00/DS43050257. That is why I can say that you are wrong.``
``Besides, who ever decided that this decision of yours violates Ryuun law?@k@vS16/00/DS43050259. It's an assumption you concocted by yourself. A shackle and prison that you imposed on yourself.``

``After probing the topic carefully, the Ryuun only decided on one thing... To coexist with the natives of their new homeworld and build a new prosperous future.@k@vS16/00/DS43050261. Tell me, what part of that have you violated, exactly?``
``...Stop!!@k@vS16/45/DS43071120_1. Stop, stop, stop, stooooooooop!!!``
I couldn't help but feel irritated... so I shouted.
I screamed loud enough to drown out the roar of the rain.
``This child... This child... might be born with horns!@k@vS16/45/DS43071122. Yet you would have me subject them to the same torment as me?``

``To suffer, worry, and grieve just like me... and question what they are, if neither Ryuun nor human?!@k@vS16/45/DS43071124. Did you... did you think I could ever submit my child to that cruel destiny?!``
``...Hanyuu.``

``I've suffered from this agony for so, so long!@k@vS16/45/DS43071126. From being persecuted simply because I have horns!@k@vS16/45/DS43071127. You're not human if you've got horns!@k@vS16/45/DS43071128. They call that a demon!@k@vS16/45/DS43071129. One that must never mingle amongst them!``
That's why I chose to live as a Jedha.
...Yeah, that's right. Truth be told... I'm well aware of what I was seeking by continuing to be a Jedha.
Since I couldn't live as a human, I wanted a place where I could belong as a Ryuun.
That was why I took up the sword.
That was I why I tried to keep my heart balanced by being a transcendent being who protected humans.
That was the true reason why I so stubbornly refused to accept the Jedha name would lose all meaning within a few years thanks to the decrease in Putus.
A vague entity that was neither human nor Ryuun... that was me.
Why couldn't I be human...?
Why could I not carry out a life as a Ryuun...?
I lived up until today tormented by that doubt, that paradox.
...I'm sure I'd still be suffering from it now, had I never met Riku.
I could never let my own child face that exact same pain...!!

``I was always alone, unable to become a human nor be a Ryuun...!@k@vS16/45/DS43071131. I was so, so lonely!@k@vS16/45/DS43071132. It hurt so much when people called me a demon!@k@vS16/45/DS43071133. You would have me put Riku... and my child through all of that?``
``Like hell!@k@vS16/45/DS43071135. Are you saying I need to be that inhuman?!``
``Hanyuu...``
Humans are creatures that can only view things in a broad way. If they learn someone is a demon, then they'll consider those close to it demons as well.

Riku was in a dangerous position just by being with me. He may have been known as Oyashiro-sama's reincarnation, but what would happen if rumors spread that he'd married someone with horns... a demon?
Even an adult like me had my horns accidentally revealed to Shino once. So it went without saying the villagers would quickly find out if it was a child.
What would become of the child and Riku once that happened?
I'm sure we'd completely lose our current peaceful way of life...
``Us Ryuun living as humans in this world... it's not ordinary!``

``I can't... just bring a child into this world... knowing I'd be bringing them pain by saddling them with that resignation... with that burden.@k@vS16/45/DS43071138. There's no way in hell I can do it...!!``
``Even if your child... lives the same way as you?``
``What?!``

``I know because of how many times we've synchronized.@k@vS16/00/DS43050266. Right now, you're thrilled to be pregnant with the child of the man you love.@k@vS16/00/DS43050267. ...Yet you're forcing yourself.``
``You're more concerned with potential misfortune over your current happiness, and you're scared to accept that...``
``I'm not... I'm not pushing myself!@k@vS16/45/DS43071141. I'm not...!``
``That is the definition of pushing yourself.``
I fell into a sorrowful silence... She'd hit the nail on the head so well there was nothing I could say to that.
Still, though... Just why was Ryuun-Ohc standing her ground so hard?
And where in the world... had she come to learn such assertion and consideration...?

``It is true you may have lived a harsh life.@k@vS16/00/DS43050271. There is no guarantee your child will meet someone like Riku was for you.@k@vS16/00/DS43050272. However, there is one thing they have that you didn't.``
``And that's you and Riku... Parents who understand everything, who will stay beside them.``
...That's right.
Just as she says, this child can be born and raised under me and Riku's protection.
...My parents were already dead before I was old enough to remember them.
I didn't have anyone to teach me human principles or to mediate with them.
In that sense, this child is far more blessed than I was.
And I'm sure people as kind as Shino will help in the future as well.
...However.
Even so, I just couldn't accept that lying down.
Just as Ryuun-Ohc said, my child may live strong and be blessed with good friends and a spouse.
But... what would they do if that didn't come to pass?
That child would likely direct their bitterness and hatred for being born that way at me, their mother.
If I were faced with such a hateful expression...
If they resentfully cursed me right to my face...
I seriously doubt... I would be able stay sane.
Call it cowardice... but even so, I still couldn't face that fear tormenting me, nor could I see any light at the end of that tunnel.
So, I resume the chant to drive away her concerns...
``...Hai-Ryuun Yeasomul Jedha.@k@vS16/45/DS43071146. As the successor of the Jedha name, I seek contact with Lynos Ryuun-Ohc.``
``Hanyuu...!``
``Open up already!!@k@vS16/45/DS43071148. This is an order as a Jedha!!``
Ryuun-Ohc didn't respond, nor did Onigafuchi Swamp change.
Infuriated, I stepped into the swamp.
I got on my knees, sunk my hand into the water, and recited the chant again.
Just as I thought... no response.
``Open up, Ryuun-Ohc...@k@vS16/45/DS43071150. Please... Please...!``
I'm begging you...
I don't want to hurt anyone... And... I'm scared of getting hurt myself.
So please... listen to me, Ryuun-Ohc...
I crouched down over the edge of the swamp, my hair dangling onto the surface amidst the rain.
What do I do?
Just what am I supposed to do...?
Just then...
``...Hanyuu!``
I heard a voice.
It was a lovely voice... but also the voice I wanted to hear least right now.
I looked behind me... and saw Riku was indeed there.
Riku frantically ran through the rain and into the swamp.
I quickly tried to stand up when I saw that, but my body refused to listen to me, and I quickly fell back down.
Riku rushed up to me, picked me up with a sad look on his face, and spoke.
``Please, stop!@k@vS16/46/DS43020607. What do you think you're doing?!``
``Why do you need to kill yourself?!``
I instinctively turned around and looked at Riku's face when I heard those unexpected words.
Kill myself...?!
His misinterpretation of the situation had me momentarily dumbfounded... but on the other hand, it cooled my head a little.
Perhaps it was understandable for him to assume that when I was here in the swamp water all by myself.
``A-am I mistaken...?!``
``O-of course!@k@vS16/45/DS43071157. There's no way I, of all people, would kill myself without saying a word to you...!``
``Then why did you come here?``
I suddenly looked away and hung my head when Riku asked that.
I couldn't tell him. There's no way I could tell him.
How could I possibly say I was trying to kill his child...?
``...Hanyuu.``
After a brief pause, Riku, who'd been looking at me the whole time, suddenly broke the silence.
``Shino-san told me everything.``

``When I heard the news, I was truly happy.@k@vS16/46/DS43020615. So I waited for you, figuring we could celebrate together once you told me.@k@vS16/46/DS43020616. But I couldn't find you, no matter where I looked... so I got worried!``
``...So tell me... why did you come here?``
``Th-that's...``
``...@k@vS16/46/DS43020619. Do you really hate the idea of having my child that much?``
``O-of course not!!``
I instinctively raised my voice and looked up.
...Please...
Please, don't look at me like you're about to burst into tears.
Hearing Shino tell me I was pregnant with Riku's child was the happiest moment of my life.
A child with Riku, even though I thought I could never conceive...
Of course I was happy. There's no way I could hate the idea.
``Then why?@k@vS16/46/DS43020621. Why... didn't you tell me?``
``...@k@vS16/45/DS43071166. Because this child shares my blood!``
I shouted while resenting my existence.
Riku didn't seem surprised.
``...If you're not surprised, that means you've realized it too, haven't you?@k@vS16/45/DS43071168. There's a chance our child could have horns just like me...!``
And once the village learned of the child's horns...
Just imagining it made me shiver... There's no way they'd ever approve.
``So I decided to abort this child...``

``That is why I came to Onigafuchi Swamp.@k@vS16/45/DS43071171. This swamp is where I synchronize with Ryuun-Ohc.@k@vS16/45/DS43071172. In there, it's possible to do things that are difficult in this world.@k@vS16/45/DS43071173. So with that...``
...I can kill our child before it's born...
But I couldn't say any of that... least of all look Riku in the eyes.
...I knew.
I knew that no matter what I told him, Riku would not consent.
He was too kind.
Too caring.
Too accepting.
Too true to his heart.
And... he was the one who loved me with all he had.
That was Riku Furude... The one I loved more than anyone.
But even so... No, because of that, I couldn't waver on my decision.
If I truly cared about the child and Riku... then I couldn't back down on this.

``Even if I have this child, they'll never be able to find happiness.@k@vS16/45/DS43071175. ...And you will be saddled with hardships and sorrows you never should have had to bear to begin with.@k@vS16/45/DS43071176. So, I...``
``...Hanyuu.@k@vS16/46/DS43020624. Does that mean you're denying my existence, too?``
``I'm only here right now because you saved my life.@k@vS16/46/DS43020626. My father told me all about it.``
My mind flashed back to a scene from 22 years ago.
The ``demonified`` Grifys. The attacked village, the maelstrom of pandemonium... and fire.
I swung my sword amidst all of that, cutting down the demons.
...This was the former Onigafuchi Village.
Just what was it I did back then?
What did I feel when I found that small baby in the wreckage of that house about to collapse...?
``...They'll almost certainly live a life so harsh that death would be the preferrable option.@k@vS16/45/DS43071180. In that case, before it comes to that, I should...``
And then...
What was it I did to that baby...?
The answer was...
...The answer was the man right in front of me who'd made me so happy.
``Hanyuu...``
Just then, Riku gently took my hand into his own, and...
``Please... have the child.``
Riku said that to me as a powerful light clearly shone in his gaze.
``...But I'll... just be a burden on you...``
``...Were you lying when you became my wife?``
``O-of course not!``
``Then please, have faith in me too.@k@vS16/46/DS43020631. I truly love you, and am prepared to accept everything if it means making you happy.``
My rock-solid determination crumbled... and the ice closing off my heart slowly melted.
...That wasn't fair.
If he tells me that... I feel like I'm going to take him up on that kindness.
``I heard the truth of my origins... when I was 10.@k@vS16/46/DS43020633. Back then, I said the same sort of thing as you.@k@vS16/46/DS43020634. I asked if I was not a member of the Furude family.``
``But my father smiled and told me this:@k@vS16/46/DS43020636. ``You are Riku Furude. Even if we don't share my blood, you are undeniably my son.````
``...At that moment, I was saved from the suffering that I was not my father's true son.@k@vS16/46/DS43020638. So I want to save you this time.``
I felt a gentle sensation after he said that.
Riku embraced my soaking wet body.
His arms and chest... were unbelievably warm and full of love.

``Hanyuu, you are a kind person.@k@vS16/46/DS43020640. That's why you decided to abort the child so you wouldn't hurt anyone, but you don't have to do that.@k@vS16/46/DS43020641. You don't need to hurt yourself.``
``I will protect you and our child no matter what happens.@k@vS16/46/DS43020643. ...That child is a life who deserves to be born.``
Riku said that and smiled.
He was the life I'd saved 22 years ago, even though I'd tried to kill him to spare him suffering.
And that very same man...
Just told me...
That our child was a life who deserved to be born.
...I was happy. My heart was overjoyed.
I didn't want to hurt anyone.
I didn't want to put the child through a painful life.
Nor did I want to cause trouble for Riku.
And I was scared of getting hurt, myself...
And yet -- I wanted to give birth.
changeReason: Changes 'I wanted to have the child' to 'I wanted to give birth' (JPN: 産みたかった), same pattern as 148393; more literal translation.

TextENGNew: Even though I had steeled myself to end the pregnancy, to make everything right...
changeReason: Changes 'abort the child in order to resolve everything' to 'end the pregnancy, to make everything right'; 'end the pregnancy' is more euphemistic than 'abort.'

TextENGNew: In truth, no matter what anyone might say, I wanted to bring this beloved child into the world--
changeReason: Changes 'I loved the child, and I wanted to have it' to 'I wanted to bring this beloved child into the world'; restructured with different emphasis and more active phrasing.

TextENGNew: ``I will protect you both.@k@vS16/46/DS43020645. No matter what it takes, no matter what I must endure -- I love you both, and I will keep you safe, always--``
changeReason: Original includes 'So... would you please have the child?' which is present in JPN; new translation cuts this final sentence, ending at 'always--' instead.

TextENGNew: ``...U-aaah... uwaaaaaaaaaaah!!``
changeReason: Changes vocalization pattern 'Uuu, aaah' to 'U-aaah'; minor difference in how the emotional outburst is romanized.

TextENGNew: Buried in Riku's chest, I wept.
changeReason: Changes 'I cried in Riku's chest' to 'Buried in Riku's chest, I wept'; adds the physical positioning and uses more literary 'wept.'

TextENGNew: Words failed me entirely, and I sobbed like a child.
changeReason: Restructures sentence order; 'I wept like a child, completely at a loss' becomes 'Words failed me entirely, and I sobbed like a child.'

TextENGNew: I forgot that I was a Ryuun. I forgot that I bore horns. I forgot everything.
changeReason: Splits one sentence into three ('I forgot...I forgot...I forgot') vs original's single compound sentence; adds rhetorical emphasis through repetition.

TextENGNew: All I felt was the happiness of knowing I would bear the child of the one I loved...
changeReason: Changes 'joy that I'd be having the child of the man I loved' to 'happiness of knowing I would bear the child of the one I loved'; 'bear' is more literary than 'having.'

TextENGNew: ...and the warmth of the arms that held me close.
changeReason: Changes 'those arms embracing me' to 'the arms that held me close'; both convey the same core meaning but with slightly different intimacy framing.
